column1: # ALTAIR spread table -- broker spreads in USD per share (from MT5).
# Fill/update monthly: MT5 -> Market Watch -> symbol -> spread (points -> USD).
# Conversion: US equity CFDs have tick size 0.001 -> spread_usd = points * 0.001
# NOTE: values below captured with market CLOSED -> worst case (upper bound).
# Lines starting with # are ignored. Missing tickers = edge not computed
